title: Woodworker's Delight
description: The mod adds a lot of different decorations and blocks that the player can use when building his cute little house.
body:
List of content in the beta version of the mod:

Materials and Decorations:  
  
- Treated Plate  
- Treated Stick  
- Treated Planks  
- Treated Stairs  
- Treated Slab  
- Treated Table  
- Treated Chair  
- Treated Button  
- Treated Pressure Plate  
- Crate  
- Framed Glass  
- Framed Glass Pane    
- Mobs Figurine (Creeper, Zombie, Skeleton, Wither-Skeleton)  

Tools and Weapons:  
  
- Short Swords (cooper, iron, amethyst, gold, diamond, netherite)  
- Short Sword Base  
- Saw  
Most of the content is not done yet. I hope you enjoy what I've done so far.  

 

The mod is made in MCreator, but in the future I think to switch to coding. Also soon will be a port to fabriс 1.20.1
